settings.headline: Brows that look real. Done in seconds.
settings.subheadline: The Tattoo Brow Pen uses a precision microblade tip to create hair-like strokes that blend seamlessly with your natural brows.

settings.bullet_2: Dual-sided: microblade tip for brows + fine tip for eyeliner
settings.review_quote: One side is precise for drawing hair-like strokes, and the 4-tip side makes my brows look fuller in seconds. Very natural finish.

settings.text: Discover thoughtfully chosen essentials for hair, skin, and beauty tools—designed to elevate your daily routine. Effortlessly enhance your natural look with products that make feeling confident and polished part of your everyday life.

settings.heading: Feel confident in how you look and comfortable all day long.

settings.text: This lightweight hairline powder blends naturally with your hair, enhancing fullness and definition without looking obvious. Its barely-there feel keeps you at ease from morning to night, so you can enjoy a boost of confidence that feels just as good as it looks.

settings.title: Delivery Across Lebanon
settings.text: Orders shipped through local partners for smooth, reliable delivery.

settings.title: Curated Quality Products
settings.text: Every item is carefully selected so you receive products we trust.

settings.title: WhatsApp Support
settings.text: Message us on WhatsApp for quick help with orders or questions.

settings.title: Are the products safe to use?
settings.text:
Yes, all our products are sourced from trusted suppliers and are safe for everyday use.
You can find usage instructions and details on each product page.

settings.title: What if I receive a damaged or defective item?
settings.text:
If an item arrives damaged or not working, we will replace it.
Please contact us within 48 hours of delivery through email or WhatsApp.

settings.title: Can I cancel my order?
settings.text:
Yes, we can cancel orders as long as they haven’t been shipped yet.
Once the courier has picked up your order, we can no longer cancel it.

settings.title: How can I contact customer support?
settings.text:
You can always reach us at:
📧 hello@zeidbeauty.com
📱 WhatsApp: +961 79 010 758

settings.title: How can I track my order?
settings.text:
After your order is shipped, our local courier will message or call you with delivery updates.
You can also reach out to us anytime if you need help.

settings.title: How does delivery work and how long does it take?
settings.text: We ship using trusted local couriers to ensure fast and reliable delivery. Once your order is processed, the courier will contact you by message or phone to confirm the delivery details. Most orders arrive within 2 to 5 business days anywhere in Lebanon. At the moment, we deliver within Lebanon only and do not offer international shipping.

settings.title: Do you offer refunds?
settings.text:
Refunds are provided for damaged or incorrect items after review.
If approved, refunds are processed using the original payment method.

settings.title: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.text:
We accept:

  • Cash on Delivery
  • Online transfers through Whish Money
